inputs.label: Total Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Total perimeter length of all walls to be sided.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total perimeter length of all walls to be sided.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplanacak tüm duvarların toplam çevre uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale du périmètre de tous les murs à barder.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the walls from base to eaves.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the walls from base to eaves.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe der Wände vom Boden bis zur Traufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur des murs de la base à l'avant-toit.

inputs.label: Area per Window
inputs.businessContext: Average area of a single window opening.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average area of a single window opening.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir pencere açıklığının ortalama alanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface moyenne d'une ouverture de fenêtre.

inputs.label: Area per Door
inputs.businessContext: Average area of a single door opening.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average area of a single door opening.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir kapı açıklığının ortalama alanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface moyenne d'une seule ouverture de porte.

inputs.label: Siding Panel Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Surface area covered by one siding panel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Surface area covered by one siding panel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir dış cephe panelinin kapladığı yüzey alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Oberfläche, die von einer Fassadenverkleidungsplatte abgedeckt wird.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra material to account for cuts and waste (e.g., 0.1 for 10%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra material to account for cuts and waste (e.g., 0.1 for 10%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve fireyi hesaba katmak için ek malzeme (ör. %10 için 0,1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliches Material für Zuschnitte und Abfall (z. B. 0,1 für 10 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Matériel supplémentaire pour tenir compte des coupes et des pertes (ex. 0,1 pour 10 %).
